game_info.title: VoxelCraft
game_info.concept:
Dive into an open world of building, crafting and survival. Gather resources, survive the night, and build whatever you can imagine one block at a time. Explore and craft your way through a completely open world where you can play with friends, build a city, start a farm, mine deep into the ground, face mysterious enemies, or just experiment to the limits of your imagination! 

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/minecraft-dream-it-build-it/id479516143

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Dive into an open world of building, crafting and survival. Gather resources, survive the night, and build whatever you can imagine one block at a time. Explore and craft your way through a completely open world where you can play with friends, build a city, start a farm, mine deep into the ground, face mysterious enemies, or just experiment to the limits of your imagination! 
 
The possibilities are endless. Embark on an epic adventure and play with friends, building from the ground up. Build and expand in Creative mode, where you can craft from unlimited resources. Survive the night, face intense battles, craft tools, and fend off danger in Survival mode. With seamless cross-platform and multiplayer gameplay on Minecraft: Bedrock Edition, you can adventure solo or with friends, and discover an infinite, randomly generated world filled with blocks to mine, biomes to explore, and mobs to befriend (or battle)!  
 
In Minecraft, the world is yours to shape! 
 
CREATE YOUR WORLD 
• Build anything from the ground up 
• Craft from special resources and tools to create brand new structures and landscapes 
• Explore an endless open world full of different biomes and creatures 
• Minecraft Marketplace – Get creator-made add-ons, thrilling worlds, and stylish cosmetics on Minecraft Marketplace 
• Connect with millions of players on community servers, or subscribe to Realms Plus to cross-play with up to 10 friends on your own private server 
• Slash commands – Tweak how the game plays: you can change the weather, summon mobs, change the time of day, and more 
• Add-ons – Customize your experience even further with add-ons! If you're more tech-inclined, you can modify your game to create new resource packs 
 
MULTIPLAYER ONLINE GAMES 
• Join free massive multiplayer servers and play with thousands of others 
• Multiplayer servers allow you to play with up to 4 players online with a free Xbox Live account 
• Build, battle and explore other realms. With Realms and Realms Plus, you can play with up to 10 friends cross-platform, anytime, anywhere on Realms, your own private server that we host for you 
• With Realms Plus, get instant access to over 150 Marketplace items with new additions each month. Share with friends on your own private Realms server*  
• Connect and play with players across the world, wherever they are, and join in on MMO battles for survival in other worlds 
• Discover gigantic community-run worlds, compete in unique mini-games and socialize in lobbies full of fellow Minecrafters 
 
SUPPORT: https://www.minecraft.net/help 
LEARN MORE: https://www.minecraft.net/ 

Here are the links to our Privacy Policy and Terms and Conditions:
Privacy Policy: https://www.minecraft.net/privacy/gdpr
Terms and Conditions: https://account.mojang.com/terms
 
MINIMUM RECOMMENDED SPECIFICATION 
 
To check the requirements for your device visit: https://help.minecraft.net/hc/en-us/articles/4409172223501 
 
*Realms & Realms Plus: Try a free 30-day trial in-app. 

Minecraft may request the following optional permissions, which require your consent. You can continue to use Minecraft without granting these permissions; however, some features may be limited or unavailable.
For more information, please see below:
• Local Network: To find other devices on the same Wi‑Fi network for multiplayer gameplay.
• App Tracking: To deliver personalized ads and improve application experience
game_info.description: VoxelCraft is an open-world sandbox game where you can build, explore, and survive in a procedurally generated 3D world. Unleash your creativity by placing various types of blocks to construct elaborate structures, or reshape the terrain by mining resources. The world is yours to shape, block by block.
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Up/Down: Look Up/Down
- Arrow Left/Right: Look Left/Right
- W/A/S/D: Move Forward/Left/Backward/Right
- Space: Jump
- Z: Perform Action (Place Block / Break Block)
- Shift: Cycle Selected Tool/Block (Dirt -> Stone -> Wood -> Brick -> Leaf -> Remover)
- ESC: Pause/Resume Game
- ENTER: Start Game
- R: Restart Game (from Game Over/Pause)

TEST_1.test_description: Verify game initialization and phase transition from START to PLAYING.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Start the game, simulate pressing ENTER, and check if gameState.gamePhase updates to "PLAYING".
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The game phase should change to "PLAYING", and the player entity should be initialized.
TEST_1.description: Verify game initialization and phase transition from START to PLAYING.
TEST_1.strategy: Start the game, simulate pressing ENTER, and check if gameState.gamePhase updates to "PLAYING".
TEST_1.expected: The game phase should change to "PLAYING", and the player entity should be initialized.

TEST_2.strategy_description: Position player in mid-air, update physics for several frames, and verify Y position decreases.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player's Y position should be lower than the starting Y position after physics updates.
TEST_2.strategy: Position player in mid-air, update physics for several frames, and verify Y position decreases.
TEST_2.expected: Player's Y position should be lower than the starting Y position after physics updates.

test_2_ModeBtn.expected: Player's Y position should be lower than the starting Y position after physics updates.

TEST_3.strategy_description: Place player slightly above a block, apply gravity, and verify player stops falling at block height.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Player's vertical velocity should become 0, and Y position should stabilize on top of the block.
TEST_3.strategy: Place player slightly above a block, apply gravity, and verify player stops falling at block height.
TEST_3.expected: Player's vertical velocity should become 0, and Y position should stabilize on top of the block.

TEST_5.strategy_description: Simulate pointing at a valid location (using mock raycast) and pressing Z to place a block.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: The voxel world data should contain a new block at the target coordinates.

TEST_6.strategy_description: Select 'Remover' tool, point at an existing block, simulate pressing Z.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: The block at the target coordinates should be removed (set to 0) in the voxel world data.
